summary: Comprehensive testing of EuroAdria Admin Panel sidebar navigation after JSX structural bug fix. All 14 sidebar tabs work correctly. Found 1 critical bug: duplicate data-testid='nav-investment' between Header and Admin sidebar causing navigation conflict.

ui_bugs.issue: Duplicate data-testid='nav-investment' - Header's INVESTMENT link (line 205) and Admin sidebar's Investment button both have same data-testid, causing Playwright to click wrong element
ui_bugs.fix: Rename Header's data-testid to 'header-nav-investment' or Admin sidebar's to 'admin-nav-investment'

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts component sizing issue, non-blocking

action_items: Fix duplicate data-testid='nav-investment' conflict between Header.jsx (line 205) and AdminPage.jsx sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: JSX structural bug fix verified - sidebar layout renders correctly with flex container
All 14 admin tabs render their respective content correctly
Mobile responsive design working - sidebar slides in/out on mobile
Active tab highlighting works (gold background on active item)
Investment tab has 3 sub-tabs (Standorte, Infrastruktur, Zonen) all functional
Rechtliches tab has 3 sub-tabs (Impressum, Datenschutz, AGB) all functional

success_rate.frontend: 93% - 13/14 tabs pass directly, 1 tab (Investment) requires workaround due to data-testid conflict

tabs_tested.dashboard: PASS - AnalyticsDashboard renders with stats cards and charts
tabs_tested.articles: PASS - Articles list with Bulk Import button
tabs_tested.pages: PASS - Pages CMS with edit buttons
tabs_tested.homepage: PASS - Homepage content editor with Hero, Testimonial, Stats sections
tabs_tested.comments: PASS - Comments management with filter tabs (Ausstehend, Freigegeben, Abgelehnt)
tabs_tested.regions: PASS - Regions list with predefined regions (Skadar Lake, Zabljak, Budva, Niksic, Podgorica)
tabs_tested.investment: PASS (with workaround) - Investment data with sub-tabs (Standorte 22, Infrastruktur 14, Zonen 8)
tabs_tested.legal: PASS - Legal page editor with Impressum/Datenschutz/AGB sub-tabs

mobile_testing.sidebar_open: PASS - Sidebar slides in when menu button clicked
mobile_testing.sidebar_close: PASS - Close button (X) visible and functional
mobile_testing.navigation_items: PASS - All 14 nav items visible in mobile sidebar

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel sidebar navigation fully functional after JSX fix. All 14 tabs work. Known issue: data-testid='nav-investment' is duplicated in Header.jsx and AdminPage.jsx - when testing Investment tab, use page.query_selector_all() and select the 2nd element (sidebar button) instead of first (header link). Cookie consent modal appears on first visit - dismiss with 'Alle akzeptieren'.

rca_of_issue.issue: Investment sidebar tab click navigates to /investment public page instead of showing admin Investment content
rca_of_issue.root_cause: Duplicate data-testid='nav-investment' - Header.jsx line 205 has <Link data-testid='nav-investment' to='/investment'> which appears before AdminPage.jsx sidebar button in DOM
reproduction_steps: 3. First element found is Header's link, not sidebar button
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Use page.query_selector_all('[data-testid="nav-investment"]')[1] to get sidebar button, or fix by renaming one of the data-testids
